body.title: bash shortcuts: uurecall + uuresearch
body.result: uurecall.py + uuresearch.py scripts in lab/claudecode/; uurecall/uuresearch functions added to ~/.bashrc
body.intention: I intend that CC and Akien can invoke librarian recall and research from the bash prompt with uurecall and uuresearch shell functions.
body.description:
Add uurecall() and uuresearch() shell functions to ~/.bashrc so that librarian full-text recall and research+summarize runs are accessible directly from the terminal without manually constructing MCP calls. Functions should pass all arguments as the query string and print results to stdout.

**Affected files:** ~/.bashrc (or ~/.bash_aliases if that's preferred)
**Design rules:** none apply — shell config change only
**Scope boundary:** In scope: two shell functions that invoke the librarian via the existing CC_WORKFLOW_TOOLS path or MCP equivalent. Out of scope: new librarian capabilities, changes to librarian itself.
**Completion criteria:** Running `uurecall inference proxy` in a terminal returns recall results from the librarian. Running `uuresearch inference proxy` returns a research summary. Both handle multi-word queries via "$@". Documented with a one-line comment in .bashrc.
